sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115688" key="yiaqi/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψῐᾰθ-ίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n115688.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lie on a mat,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Facet.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">107</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
